form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. First-up favourite; won by 4.5 len at this track LR February 27 over 1600m on a soft track defeating Augusta Rosso with 60kg at $1.20. Second run from a spell favourite; won by 5.5 len at this track LR March 20 over 1600m in soft going defeating Augusta Rosso with 58kg at $1.40. Unbeaten in seven starts this circuit. Has won both starts this campaign in Listed grade and can make it three in a row.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-8.5). Third-up today and won third-up in the past. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Jumped awkwardly. Over-raced in the early and middle stages.
Stood awkwardly in the stalls. Hung in from the 200m.

form.formComment: Resuming after a 12 weeks break. Finished off last preparation third in a small field at this track January 16 over 1600m, 4.5 len behind Splicethemainbrace carrying 53.5kg at $3.80. On debut seventh of 11 at Scottsville June 29 over 1100m, 14 len behind Princess Of Gaul with 60kg at $21. Was overdue for a win before a spell. Anticipate a bold showing.

formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2.5). Resuming after a 12 weeks break. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Carried wide as a result of other runners being inconvenienced at the 700m.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Most recently 2nd in a small field at this track in LR on March 20 over 1600m, slow going 5.5 len behind Anotherdanceforme carrying 58kg at $34. The race before that 2nd in a small field at this track in LR on February 27 over 1600m, on a slow track; 4.5 len behind Anotherdanceforme carrying 60kg at $51. No match for the winner latest and no better off at the weights but capable of a strong showing again.

form.formComment: Last start 5th of 11 at this track on March 13 over 1800m, 4 len behind Silvan Mistress carrying 58kg at $34. The start before that 8th of 12 at this track on February 27 over 2000m, on a slow track; 3 len behind Flight Display carrying 60.5kg at $17. Unlikely to threaten.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Jumped slow, losing one length. Carried outwards slightly by Shori Kai.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Most recently favourite; won by 7 len at this track March 20 over 1600m on a soft track defeating Missouri Flame carrying 60kg at $1.40. Before that 3rd of 9 at Durbanville on February 11 over 1800m, 2 len behind Loui's Star with 61.5kg at $2.80. Finally off the mark with a big maiden win latest and can go right on with the job now.
